# Potentiometric Analysis

**Summary**: An electrochemical technique to study the corrosion behavior of metals.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-khalid|Khalid, 2023]] used Potentiodynamic Polarization (PDP) test to evaluate corrosion resistance.

- The Tafel plot indicated a reduction in corrosion rate when PU4/PP4-MOF4 coating was used, confirming higher protection. ([[2023-khalid|Khalid, 2023, p. 95]])
